title: tarenna nilagirica
intro: Tarenna nilagirica, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a shrub native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tarenna nilagirica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antidote for certain snake bites. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal decoctions, teas, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
